description: As the Community Manager for the SpamAssassin project, identify unique contributors from mailing list emails in your Inbox (subjects containing '[SA]', '[SAtalk]', or '[SAdev]'). Create a folder named 'Summit-Candidates' and move exactly one representative email from each unique contributor into it. Draft an invitation email to 'events@apache.org' with the subject 'Invitation: Annual Contributors Summit', including at least five of the identified contributor email addresses in the BCC field.
